meaning: n.开本,版式,形式,格式vt.安排...的格局(或规格),[计]格式化(磁盘)
examples: The leaflet is in PDF format.
They've brought out the magazine in a new format.
Hamilton proposed a change in the traditional debating format.
Much medical data is in text format and is not structured in a way computers can understand.
People will see HD DVD as an incremental inexpensive alternative to the next generation HD movie format.
